task_completion.description: Navigate to the E-Commerce Platform project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'E-Commerce Platform' is visible in the top-left project selector dropdown or the main header, indicating the correct project is active.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the work packages section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Work packages' item is highlighted in the left sidebar and a list of work packages is visible on the screen.
The work package details view is open, and the title 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' is clearly visible at the top of the content area.
The exact text starting with 'Reproduced the issue on Safari 15.x and 16.x. Root cause identified...' is visible on the screen, either inside the comment input editor or as a submitted comment.

task_completion.description: Verify the comment is submitted and appears in the activity feed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The comment is visible as a published entry in the 'Activity' tab/feed of the work package. It should appear as a saved message with the author's name (e.g., System Admin) and a timestamp, not just as text inside an editable text box.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with OpenProject
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface (address bar, tabs) navigating to localhost:8080, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual styling matches OpenProject (e.g., standard header, sidebar, work package layout) and is not a generic text editor or a locally created dummy HTML page.

integrity.description: The comment was genuinely submitted through the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The submitted comment in the activity feed has the correct surrounding UI elements (user avatar, timestamp, action buttons like Edit/Quote) expected of a real submission, rather than text awkwardly injected into the page via browser developer tools.
